The Forge (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,123,632Details
International Box Office $571,240
Worldwide Box Office $29,694,872
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $145,807
Total $145,807
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Isaiah Wright has some growing up to do. A year out of high school with no plans for his future, Isaiah is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and a prayer warrior named Miss Clara, as well as biblical discipleship from his new mentor, Isaiah begins to discover God’s purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,659,508 (22.9% of total gross)
Legs:4.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,818 opening theaters/1,921 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,797,407

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 29th, 2024 (Limited) (Mexico)
August 29th, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 26th, 2024 (Limited), released as A Forja - O Poder da Transformação (Brazil)
Video Release: October 8th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2825 (cert #54739), 3/13/2024)
Running Time: 123 minutes

Languages: English

Synopsis

Isaiah Wright has some growing up to do. A year out of high school with no plans for his future, Isaiah is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and a prayer warrior named Miss Clara, as well as biblical discipleship from his new mentor, Isaiah begins to discover God’s purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.
